title: Thelypodium texanum
intro: Thelypodium texanum, commonly known as Texas tumbleweed or Texas watercress, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Thelypodium texanum include isothiocyanates, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits. The most common herbal preparations made with Thelypodium texanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory issues and as a natural remedy for colds and flu.
